Class EntryRedemptionFullSubtype

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.EntryRedemptionFullSubtype

    • of

      public static EntryRedemptionFullSubtype of(String value)
      Returns a EntryRedemptionFullSubtype with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
